creator: question+fbsdports@closedsrc.org
text:
On 2011-08-26 09:01 -0400, Steven Kreuzer <skreuzer@freebsd.org> wrote:

> The port looks good and I would like to commit it, but the maintainer is =
set to ports@freebsd.org
> Are you willing to maintain this port? If not, I would prefer not to add =
it to the ports tree
>=20
> Please let me know.
>=20
> Thanks

Oops, I forgot to change that. I'm willing to be the maintainer for the
port.

--=20
Linh Pham
question+fbsdports@closedsrc.org
